untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-instrument implied volatility comparison (IV_A > IV_B), delta measurements across two separate instruments, and ratio spread construction logic. These are OPTIONS-SPECIFIC metrics (implied_volatility, delta, option_greeks) that are NOT available in the provided indicator list, which only contains price-action and technical indicators. Additionally, MEAN_REVERSION is not in ALLOWED_REGIMES list (only TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, HIGH_VOL, ANY are allowed). This signal requires an options-aware backtesting framework with cross-instrument volatility surface data.
translation_notes: This is a sophisticated volatility arbitrage strategy from Natenberg's work on option spreads. It cannot be translated to price-action indicators alone. Required inputs: (1) Instrument A implied_volatility, (2) Instrument B implied_volatility, (3) Short leg delta values, (4) Long leg delta values, (5) Relative pricing between instruments. The strategy also requires regime detection for MEAN_REVERSION which is outside the allowed regime set.
